story_prompt: Bruce Wayne and Alfred discuss the concept of subtlety within their urban environment, humorously juxtaposed with the powerful roar of a high-performance Lamborghini, before the scene dramatically cuts to a climactic title card reveal.

cues.audio_class: distant crowd shouting and chaos ambience
closing metallic whoosh and blade shimmer
